---
title: "Final Project - Bayesian Analysis of Alzheimers Data"
output: pdf_document
---

Sarenna Ulman, Sachit Sharma, Michael Güntert

```{r}
library(openxlsx)
```

```{r}
# reading in our chosen dataset from the data/raw folder
data_raw = read.xlsx("../data/raw/oasis_cross-sectional-5708aa0a98d82080.xlsx")
head(data_raw)
```
